title: Gallbladder imaging result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting symptoms, liver-test and ultrasound status, and existing investigation context without interpreting results.
assessment.rationale: Supports ultrasound, liver-test, symptom and existing investigation context for gallbladder imaging result review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Gallstone disease: diagnosis and management — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE pathway adaptation
source.population: Adults with suspected or diagnosed gallstone disease, including after gallbladder or stone treatment.
source.setting: Primary and specialist care as qualified by the cited recommendations.
source.exclusions: Supports symptom context, clinician-reviewed liver tests and imaging, established-diagnosis follow-up, and post-treatment symptom documentation without ordering investigations or recommending surgery.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting symptoms, liver-test and ultrasound status, and existing investigation context without interpreting results.

sources_used.title: Gallstone disease: diagnosis and management — Recommendations
sources_used.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE pathway adaptation
